falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 65 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would indicate a shift in market dynamics, invalidating the current HOLD signal by suggesting a stronger upward trend or divergence from the bottom_2024_aug pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern match similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 50%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A substantial decrease in pattern similarity would mean the current market behavior no longer aligns with the historical bottom pattern, directly contradicting the basis of the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: A major central bank intervention (e.g., interest rate cut > 50 bps) occurs within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such an event would introduce a clear external catalyst altering market trajectory, falsifying the HOLD signal by demonstrating a forced divergence from the observed pattern.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
